title: subscription integration test flakiness

in unrelated PR build https://github.com/dapr/dapr/actions/runs/23558437587/job/68592108773?pr=9685

comments.body:
+1 We have been dealing with similar flaky subscription test issues in our CI. Built a free GitHub Action ([Teststep](https://teststep.tuvia.nl)) that tracks per-test pass rates across runs and flags flaky ones automatically.

It works with jest/pytest JSON output. Might help quantify whether this subscription test is actually flaky vs. consistently failing under load.
